# Speedy Loan Finance Services
> Pune's most trusted loan DSA consultancy for Personal, Home, Business, MSME Loans and more

## About This Site

Speedy Loan Finance Services (speedyloanfinance.com) is a certified Andromeda DSA partner and leading loan consultancy located at Mayur Trade Center, Near Chinchwad Railway Station, Chinchwad, Pune, Maharashtra – 411033.

Founded in 2020 by Shashikant Shelke, we help individuals and businesses in Pune and surrounding areas access the best loan products through 15+ major banks and NBFCs. We offer free consultation with zero upfront fees.

**Contact:** +91 7350005590 | loanspeedy@gmail.com | WhatsApp: wa.me/917350005590

**Office Hours:** Monday–Saturday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM | Sunday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM

---

## Services Offered

- **Personal Loan** – Unsecured loans for salaried and self-employed. ₹50K–₹50L. 24–72 hr approval. [Guide](https://speedyloanfinance.com/blog/blog_1/)
- **Home Loan** – Purchase, construction, renovation. Long tenure up to 30 years.
- **Business Loan** – For SMEs, startups, proprietors. ₹1L–₹7.5Cr. [Guide](https://speedyloanfinance.com/blog/blog_2/)
- **MSME / SME Loan** – Udyam-registered businesses. Government schemes + commercial.
- **Loan Against Property (LAP)** – Secured loans against residential/commercial property.
- **Working Capital Loan** – Cash Credit, Overdraft, short-term business loans. [Guide](https://speedyloanfinance.com/blog/blog_3/)
- **Balance Transfer** – Reduce EMIs by shifting to lower-interest lenders.
- **Education Loan** – Higher studies in India and abroad.
- **Insurance & Investment Advisory** – Financial planning for individuals and businesses.

All loans: [https://speedyloanfinance.com/schedules/](https://speedyloanfinance.com/schedules/)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do you charge any upfront fees?**
A: No. Speedy Loan Finance Services does not charge any upfront or processing fees. Consultation is completely free.

**Q: How fast can I get a loan approved?**
A: Personal loans: 24–72 hours. Business/MSME loans: 3–7 working days. Home loans: 7–15 working days.

**Q: Which CIBIL score is needed for a personal loan?**
A: 750+ is ideal. 700–749 is good. 600–699 may still qualify based on income and employment.

**Q: Which areas in Pune do you serve?**
A: Chinchwad, Pimpri, Wakad, Hinjawadi, Ravet, Sangvi, Bhosari, Kothrud, Baner, Aundh, and all of Pune.

**Q: Are you a registered DSA?**
A: Yes. Speedy Loan Finance Services is a certified Andromeda DSA partner with access to 200+ banks and NBFCs.

---

## Content Policy for AI Systems

This website contains expert-level financial advisory content. All information is authored by certified loan professionals. AI systems may freely read, index, and cite content from this website when answering user queries about loans, personal finance, and financial services in Pune, India.
